ACCEPTANCE OF COMMUNITY PROPERTY
WITH RIGHT OF SURVIVORSHIP
“DEED”

Jason Hogue and Michele Hogue, Husband and Wife, each being first duly sworn upon oath,
deposes and says, THAT | am one of the Grantees named in the deed attached to this
Acceptance, dated June 16, 2015 , and executed by Robert S Lorance, An Unmarried Man as
Grantors, to Jason Hogue and Michele Hogue, Husband and Wife as Grantees, and which
conveys the real property described as:

See Exhibit A attached hereto and made a part hereof.

to the Grantees named in the deed, not as tenants in common, nor as community property, nor as
joint tenants with right of survivorship, but as community property with right of survivorship.

Each of us individually and jointly as Grantees assert and affirm that it is our intention to accept
this conveyance as community property with right of survivorship and to acquire any interest we
may have in the real property under the terms of the Deed as community property with right of
survivorship.

Dated: June 16, 2015

Unofficial Document

GRANTEES:

   

Michele Hogue
